issues.title: Brand-linked FDA recall
issues.short: FDA investigated recalled WanaBana, Schnucks, and Weis apple cinnamon pouches linked to elevated lead and chromium.
issues.details: This is a brand/product-line red flag: FDA investigated recalled apple cinnamon puree/applesauce pouches from WanaBana, Schnucks, and Weis after reports of elevated blood lead levels and product testing that found elevated lead and chromium.

evidence.summary: FDA investigation and recall of WanaBana, Schnucks, and Weis apple cinnamon puree/applesauce pouches for elevated lead and chromium.

sources.name: FDA investigation: elevated lead and chromium in cinnamon applesauce pouches

issues.title: Elevated lead in ground cinnamon
issues.short: FDA found elevated lead in multiple ground cinnamon products and advised consumers to stop using listed products.
issues.details: FDA testing found elevated lead in listed ground cinnamon products sold under several brands. FDA said prolonged exposure may be unsafe and advised consumers to discard affected products.

evidence.summary: FDA public health alert for listed ground cinnamon products with elevated lead levels.

sources.name: FDA alert: certain cinnamon products due to elevated lead

issues.title: FDA illness investigation and recall
issues.short: FDA warned consumers not to eat any Diamond Shruumz products after illnesses, hospitalizations, and a recall.
issues.details: FDA and partners investigated illnesses associated with Diamond Shruumz chocolate bars, cones, and gummies. FDA said all flavors were recalled and consumers should not eat, sell, or serve them.

evidence.summary: FDA investigation of illnesses linked to Diamond Shruumz products; all flavors recalled.

sources.name: FDA investigation: Diamond Shruumz-brand chocolate bars, cones, and gummies
